ab: Kacaw, matawalay ako a miala ko impic, manga’ay a pacaliwen iso kako han?
ch: W:Kacaw，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Kacaw, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: awaay ko no mako, o ni Panay koni.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Panay’s.

ab: manga’ay a pacaliwen kako to miming han? kalikien to ako a patikol i tisowanan.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: hayda, na.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: aray, patadoen to kako a miaray ci Panayan.
en: Thank you and thank Panay for me.

ab: o manan ko aalaen iso?
en: May I help you?

ab: mipatikol kako tona tosa a codad.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: hay, iraay ho ko roma to aalaen iso?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: micaliw ho kako tona tolo a codad.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: maherek to, haratengen ikor no tolo a romi’ad patikolen to a tayni.
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: cowa ho kapatikolen iso kako to sararop.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: patikolan to ako i nacila.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: mana awa to ko sararop no mako.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: mipacaliwan iso ci Kacaw cowa saw?
en: Did you lend it to Kacaw?

ab: cowa kafana’ kako, licayen ako cingra.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: pacaliwen ho ako kiso to no mako a sararop.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Panay, o mipacaliwan ni Kacaw kisonan koni a ciyampa han?
en: Panay, did Kacaw lend you this coat?

ab: cowa, o mi’acaan ni ina ako to hano mako.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: mahecaday ko ciyampa ni Kacaw to no miso.
en: Kacaw’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: o kohetingay ko no mira a ciyampa, cowa kahecad ko cengel niyam.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Panay, micaliway kiso to payci i ci Kacawan han?
en: Panay, did you borrow money from Kacaw?

ab: Hai , o papatikolen no mako i cingranan anini nika , matawalay ako a miala ko payci.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: ano hacowa to a patikolen iso saw?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: patikolen to ako i cingranan ano cila.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: Hayda, pasowal han to ako ci Kacaw.
en: Okay, I will tell Kacaw for you.
